name_en: First, see the caramel color flat lay. Exclusive original factory 'mouse goods', you can confidently buy from our B channel. This design is simply amazing, made of smooth calfskin, lined with lambskin, featuring the brand's classic TB logo on the front, full of a premium feel! Predicted to be BBR's next big bag 🔥
